description: The VP of HR wants a dashboard to track key recruiting metrics like time-to-fill, cost-per-hire, and open requisitions.

nodes.task_description: Identify the key metrics to be included in the dashboard.

expected_outcome.expected: The HR analyst confirms the list of required metrics.

nodes.task_description: Connect a data visualization tool (e.g., Tableau, Power BI) to the ATS and HRIS databases.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst establishes the data connections needed for the dashboard.

nodes.task_description: Build the dashboard with visualizations for each key metric.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst creates a dashboard with several charts and graphs that automatically update.
